description: MANILA, Philippines — The Philippines and Singapore have agreed to strengthen cooperation in trade, investment, and key industries such as artificial intelligence (AI) and clean energy, President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. said Saturday.

title: 9 in 10 Indian professionals say AI makes them more productive
description: A recent Randstad Workmonitor Survey 2026 found that nine in ten Indian professionals believe artificial intelligence improved their productivity at work. The findings highlighted growing optimism around AI adoption and its role in reshaping how people collaborate, work, and deliver results.
content:
Artificial intelligence is rapidly becoming an everyday workplace tool in India, with professionals increasingly recognising its impact on productivity.

title: Meta layoffs: Meta prepares for massive job cuts as Zuckerberg doubles down on AI investments
description: Meta Platforms is reportedly planning major job cuts. This move aims to fund massive investments in artificial intelligence infrastructure and technology. title: Meet Aryan Saksena: Indian American student wins AI entrepreneurship contest
description: Aryan Saksena, an Indian American student, won the 2026 High School Entrepreneurship and Artificial Intelligence Pitch Competition with his project ‘GradeLift.’ The competition had over 100 participants and Saksena received a $500 prize. His idea was inspired by the misuse of AI in writing assignments and aims to bridge the gap between students and teachers. | financialexpress.com
